title: Sexuality and Sex in Soviet and Russian history
further_info: Recommended Reading Schößler, Franziska: Einführung in die Gender Studies, Berlin 2008; Opitz-Belakhal, Claudia: Geschlechtergeschichte, Frankfurt/New York 2018; Erica L. Fraser: “Gender and Sexuality in Russian History: New Directions”, in Journal of the CHA 25 (2014) 2, S. 319-328; Dan Healey: Russian Homophobia from Stalin to Sochi, London et al. 2018.
